titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Samuel C. G. Watkins Autograph Collection
titlestmt.author: compiled by Staff of Manuscripts and Archives

conventiondeclaration.abbr: finding aid created in accordance with manuscripts and archives' processing manual.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Friday September 28, 2018 at 08:27

did.unittitle: Samuel C. G. Watkins autograph collection
did.abstract: Autograph collection of Dr. S. C. G. Watkins of Montclair, N.J. The collection consists mainly of letters (typed and holograph) to Watkins from various important persons in politics, industry, government, and the arts in the early 20th century.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Samuel C. G. Watkins Autograph Collection (MS 698). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Autograph collection of Dr. S. C. G. Watkins of Montclair, N.J. The collection consists mainly of letters (typed and holograph) to Watkins from various important persons in politics, industry, government, and the arts in the early 20th century.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright status for collection materials is unknown. Transmission or reproduction of materials protected by U.S. Copyright Law (Title 17, U.S.C.) beyond that allowed by fair use requires the written permission of the copyright owners. Works not in the public domain cannot be commercially exploited without permission of the copyright owners. Responsibility for any use rests exclusively with the user.

did.unittitle: Allenby, Edmund Henry Hynman Allenby, 1(st) viscount
Athlone, Alexander Augustus Frederick William Alfred George Cambridge, 1(st) earl of
Bernstorff Johann Heinrich Andreas Hermann Albrecht, graf von
Borglum, John Gutzon de la Mothe
Byng, Julian Hedworth George Byng, 1(st) viscount
Crewe, Robert Offey Ashburton Crewe-Milnes, 1(st) marquis
Curzon, Francis Richard Henry Penn Curzon, viscount
Lang, Cosmo Gordon, abp. Of York
Linlithgow, Victor Alexander John Hope, 2nd marquis
Lloyd George, David Lloyd George, 1(st) earl
Northcliffe, Alfred Charles William Harmsworth, 1(st) baron
Salisbury, James Edward Hubert Gascoyne Cecil, 4(th) marquis
Sutherland, George Granville Leveson Gower, 5(th) duke of
Sydenham of Combe, George Sydenham Clark, baron
Winnington-Ingrain, Arthur Foley, bp. of London
